title: Drag gallery cards out to the file system (real filenames, multi-select) WITHOUT breaking in-app drag-to-prompt
description: READ THE DOCS FIRST — a prior session shipped a fast fix, broke in-app drops, and was reverted whole. Goal: drag one or many gallery cards into an OS folder and get files named after the real media on disk, while in-app drag-to-prompt keeps working. See brief.md for the full failure account before touching code.

events.note: Carded after a failed attempt on 2026-07-20 was fully reverted (git checkout of MpiGalleryGrid.js, mediaActions.js, main.js — tree clean, nothing shipped). User asked for the card so the work can restart from investigation instead of from a patch. Root failure: the agent never routed through the Context Router (.claude/rules/components.md, docs/gallery.md, .claude/rules/events.md) and did not ask what else consumed the dragstart event.
